name: Shadow Blaster
flavour_text: Aim narrow. The shadow does the widening.
tips: 14🗡️ at 3 mana is the best raw damage per mana for a ranged Dark Mage — deploy it on an open back-row column and start chipping immediately.
Only 10🤍 — any clean 10🗡️+ hit trades it out. Park it behind a tank like Gargoyle Sorceress so melee threats burn on her first.
Best synergy is Gargoyle Sorceress directly in FRONT of her: Shadow Blaster becomes the 'Dark ranged ally behind' that triples the Sorceress's DM buff condition.

The Dark Mage tag matters more than the stats. Shady Trade Deal, Dark Matter Stash, Illicit Shadow Stones, Feed the Shadow, Matter of Time and Dark Matter Barrage all gain +1 Dark Matter per friendly Dark Mage — every Shadow Blaster on board grows your pool faster.
At 3 mana it never drains your pool — the leftover mana banks for next turn, or pays for a react like Illicit Shadow Stones (1 mana) during your opponent's turn.
rulings: Range 1 means it attacks 2 tiles orthogonally and 1 tile diagonally (see [[Range X]] in the glossary).
No triggered effects — Summon, Death, Passive, and Attack triggers are all inert. It's a vanilla statline.

Counts as a [[Dark Mage]] (element Dark, tribe exactly Mage): every per-Dark-Mage Dark Matter gain includes Shadow Blaster, and Dark Matter Stash's buff applies to it. It also satisfies Gargoyle Sorceress's 'Dark ranged ally behind' placement condition — though that tripled buff lands on the Sorceress herself, not on Shadow Blaster.
Not [[Unique]] — multiple copies can exist on the board at once (up to 3 in the deck).
